title: More Blocks Mod
description: More Blocks Mod adds vanilla like blocks to give builders a better experience. This has a few additions like terracotta brick blocks, petrified wood, and select variations of slabs and stairs that are already in game.
body:
More Blocks Mod adds vanilla like blocks to give builders a better experience. This has a few additions like terracotta brick blocks, petrified wood, and select variations of slabs and stairs that are already in game.

The main point of this mod is give more blocks to the community and will always be a work in progress.

 

 

This mod is for FabricMC and requires Fabric API to be located in the Mod folder. Look on how to install Fabric from this website : https://fabricmc.net/. 

 

Mod Contributors:

Fabric Modder - tvanprooyen

Texture Artist - lorenzodmj

 

Current Blocks

 

Featured Video:

Credit: Flammango | Video

0.1.4 Bata *Major Bug Fix Update for 0.1.3 Bata*

Fixed: Axe Behavior – “Using” an Axe on block would create 4 axes of its own type (Wood, Iron, ect.). This will no longer happen.

Fixed: Cauldon Steam Particle changed to the correct color

Internal Change: Concrete Powder Layer from LayerBlock to LayerBlockPowder (Changes full concrete powder layer to concrete)

Internal Change: Added links to fabric.mod.json

Internal Add: Added Icon to Mod

Release Notes: This is a major bug Fix Update for 0.1.3 Bata. It was reported by a couple of users that the axe would duplicate when stripping logs and stems. It's highly suggested to use 0.1.4 Bata if you are currently using 0.1.3 Bata.

 

More information listed here: Dub Glitch(Wood Stripping) · Issue #7 · tvanprooyen/mbm (github.com)

V0.1.0.0 Bata - Updated to 1.16.4

Added: Netherite Hammer – Mines blocks, does decent damage to mobs but awfully slow. Allows player to change block rotations and shapes. Works with most rotatable and shape blocks.

Changed: Lantern Behavior – Can now attach to rope

Changed: Lantern Behavior – Now have a rope texture for the top when attached to rope

Fixed: Made Vertical Glass Pane Non-Spawnable

 This Project is now in Bata as most issues are ironed out. There is a chance some features may not work correctly.

This Project  is in the Beginning of Development and All Features Listed May Not Work Until it is Fully Released.
